---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for 4K Video Downloader
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem It Solves
What problem does this feature solve? What workflow does it improve?

**Example:** "I currently have to download videos one by one, and it takes a long time. A batch import feature would let me paste 100 URLs at once."

## Proposed Solution
How would you like this feature to work?

## Alternatives Considered
Have you tried any workarounds? Are there other tools that do this?

## Platform
- [ ] Windows 10
- [ ] Windows 11
- [ ] Command Line (CLI)
- [ ] Browser Extension

## Priority
How important is this feature to you?
- [ ] Nice to have
- [ ] Important
- [ ] Critical (blocking my workflow)

## Additional Context
Screenshots, mockups, links to similar features in other apps — anything helpful.
